blended.narrative: Smugglers Notch is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.3 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 335 ft. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 2.9" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.7" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
